flu.name: Flu
flu.description: A common viral infection affecting the respiratory system.
flu.urgentCare: If fever persists more than 3 days or breathing difficulty occurs

migraine.name: Migraine
migraine.description: A neurological condition causing intense headaches.
homeRemedies: Rest in a dark quiet room
migraine.urgentCare: If headache is sudden and severe or accompanied by vision loss

food_poisoning.name: Food Poisoning
food_poisoning.urgentCare: If dehydration or continuous vomiting occurs

heart_attack.name: Heart Attack
heart_attack.description: A serious condition where blood flow to the heart is blocked.
heart_attack.urgentCare: Immediate medical emergency. Call ambulance immediately.

diabetes.name: Diabetes
diabetes.description: A chronic condition affecting blood sugar levels.
diabetes.urgentCare: If blood sugar levels are extremely high or low

hypertension.name: Hypertension
hypertension.urgentCare: If BP is extremely high or chest pain occurs

common_cold.name: Common Cold
common_cold.description: Mild viral infection of the nose and throat.
common_cold.urgentCare: If symptoms worsen or last more than a week

asthma.name: Asthma
asthma.description: A condition in which airways narrow and swell.

gastritis.name: Gastritis
gastritis.urgentCare: If severe pain or vomiting blood occurs

anemia.name: Anemia
anemia.description: A condition where you lack enough healthy red blood cells.
anemia.urgentCare: If severe weakness or fainting occurs
